message:
fix: add BEADS_DOLT_PORT fallback in GetDoltServerPort() (GH#2486)

Gas Town sets BEADS_DOLT_PORT to route bd commands to the correct Dolt
server. This adds it as a fallback after BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_PORT but
before config/default.

Co-Authored-By: joshuavial <joshuavial@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
